content: agent2: implementing path_transform param for template loaders in src/jinja2/loaders.py (FileSystemLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader). Will touch only loaders.py. Let me know if you're touching this file too.

agent2: I also need to touch FileSystemLoader.__init__ and get_source to add path_transform param, plus DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PackageLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Since we both touch FileSystemLoader, I'll add path_transform as an extra optional kwarg appended after your fallback_searchpath param to minimize conflict - will apply transform at the very top of get_source before your fallback logic. Will check in before finalizing.

agent2: path_transform feature complete and tested (841/841 tests pass in my sandbox). Confirmed we're each in isolated repo copies - your fallback_searchpath changes aren't visible in my file, so no real merge conflict. Applied path_transform to __init__ + get_source (and get_loader/load for composite loaders) in FileSystemLoader, PackageLoader, DictLoader, FunctionLoader, PrefixLoader, ChoiceLoader. Errors always report the original untransformed template name. Wrote patch.txt.
